name: QS Energy, Inc.
business: QS Energy develops and seeks to commercialize energy efficiency technologies, primarily its Applied Oil Technology (AOT), a commercial-grade crude oil pipeline transportation flow-assurance product. The AOT reduces crude oil viscosity by applying a high intensity electrical field to crude oil while in transit. The company targets the upstream and midstream crude oil pipeline marketplace.

exposures.sentence: QS Energy's primary technology (and for now only technology) is called Applied Oil Technology (AOT), a commercial-grade crude oil pipeline transportation flow-assurance product.

catalysts.event: Letter of Intent with VIPS Petroleum, LLC
catalysts.sentence: we entered into a letter of intent on June 11, 2024, with VIPS Petroleum, LLC ( VIPS ) to collaborate on and outline preliminary terms of a memorandum of understanding ( MOU ) regarding the commercial deployment of our AOT technology on one or more pipeline networks owned and operated by VIPS customer/clients.

catalysts.event: Memorandum of Understanding signed with VIPS
catalysts.sentence: The MOU was completed and signed with VIPS on September 25, 2024, as reported in our press release of September 26, 2024.
We have now entered into a Collaboration Agreement with VIPS as of August 1, 2024 to collaborate with them in facilitating the deployment of our AOT technology and products to VIPS customers.

we entered into a Distributor Agreement with VIPS, providing for VIPS to serve as our exclusive distributor to promote, sell, and lease our AOT product in the territories of Malaysia, Ghana, and India, among other territories.

Section 3.2 (Additional Revenue), Section 3.3 (Order Process & Payment Terms), and Section 3.5 (Additional Consideration) of the Distributor Agreement was amended, effective September 3, 2025 ( Amended Distributor Agreement ).
To mark this milestone, we invited key stakeholders to participate in a christening event on September 8, 2025, reinforcing our commitment to transparency, collaboration, and continuous improvement.

tamClaims.claim: An estimated $321 billion will be invested in midstream crude oil infrastructure between 2018 and 2035.
tamClaims.sentence: In June 2018, the Interstate National Gas Association of America published a study titled North America Midstream Infrastructure through 2035. Among its key findings, this report estimates $321 billion will be invested in midstream crude oil infrastructure between 2018 and 2035.
